# zrelay — REST/OpenAPI Gateway for z.ai MCP Tools

> One API key, one base URL, all z.ai tools.

## Base URL

```
https://your-zrelay-instance.com
```

## Authentication

All requests require header:

```
X-API-Key: <your-api-key>
```

Error responses follow unified format:
```json
{"error": {"code": "auth_invalid", "message": "Invalid API Key"}}
```

## Endpoints

### Search — Web Search

```
POST /api/v1/search/web-search
```

```json
{
  "query": "REST API best practices",
  "recency": "noLimit",
  "content_size": "medium",
  "location": "us"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| query | string | yes | — | Search query (max 70 chars recommended) |
| recency | string | no | "noLimit" | Time filter: oneDay, oneWeek, oneMonth, oneYear, noLimit |
| content_size | string | no | "medium" | Summary size: medium (400-600 words) or high (2500 words) |
| location | string | no | "us" | Region: cn (China) or us (other) |

### Reader — Read Web Page

```
POST /api/v1/reader/read-web
```

```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com/article",
  "timeout": 20,
  "return_format": "markdown"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| url | string | yes | — | URL of the web page to read |
| timeout | int | no | 20 | Request timeout in seconds |
| return_format | string | no | "markdown" | Response format: markdown or text |

### Zread — Repository Reader

#### Search Documentation

```
POST /api/v1/zread/search-doc
```

```json
{
  "repo": "fastapi/fastapi",
  "query": "routing",
  "language": "en"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| repo | string | yes | — | Repository in owner/repo format |
| query | string | yes | — | Search keywords or question |
| language | string | no | "en" | Language: zh or en |

#### Get Repository Structure

```
POST /api/v1/zread/repo-structure
```

```json
{
  "repo": "fastapi/fastapi",
  "dir_path": "/"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| repo | string | yes | — | Repository in owner/repo format |
| dir_path | string | no | "/" | Directory path to inspect |

#### Read File from Repository

```
POST /api/v1/zread/read-file
```

```json
{
  "repo": "fastapi/fastapi",
  "path": "README.md"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| repo | string | yes | — | Repository in owner/repo format |
| path | string | yes | — | Relative file path |

### Vision — Image & Video Analysis

#### Image Analysis

```
POST /api/v1/vision/image-analysis
```

```json
{
  "path": "/path/to/image.png",
  "prompt": "Describe what you see"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| path | string | yes | — | Path to image or video |
| prompt | string | no | null | Analysis prompt |

#### UI Diff Check

```
POST /api/v1/vision/ui-diff-check
```

```json
{
  "before_path": "/path/to/before.png",
  "after_path": "/path/to/after.png",
  "prompt": "What changed?"
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| before_path | string | yes | — | Path to before image |
| after_path | string | yes | — | Path to after image |
| prompt | string | no | null | Comparison prompt |

## Response Format

Success:
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "tool": "search",
  "operation": "web_search_prime",
  "request_id": "uuid",
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {}
}
```

Error:
```json
{
  "ok": false,
  "tool": "search",
  "operation": "web_search_prime",
  "request_id": "uuid",
  "error": {"code": "tool_error", "message": "..."},
  "error_detail": {"error": {"code": "tool_error", "message": "...", "details": null}},
  "meta": {}
}
```

## Admin Dashboard

Browser UI at `/admin` for managing API keys and viewing usage statistics.

## Health Check

```
GET /health → {"status": "ok"}
GET /ready  → {"status": "ready"}
```

## OpenAPI Docs

Swagger UI available at `/docs`.
